removeSong_command_song_not_found: Track {1} was not found in playlist '{0}'.

removeSong_command_unknown_error: Could not remove track {1} from playlist '{0}' because an unknown error occurred.

viewPlaylist_command_unknown_error: Playlist '{0}' could not be displayed because an unknown error occurred.
